doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: Section 8 of the EEOC Compliance Manual covers Retaliation, not Age Discrimination, and the document includes modern technological references absent from the official manual.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The official EEOC Compliance Manual Section 8 is titled "Retaliation," not "Age Discrimination," and the text uses modern terminology not found in current EEOC manual sections.
